default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and align on AirOps and GXL's go-forward agreement, focusing on scalability, cost optimization, and platform enhancements.](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Agreement to move towards a platform fee model with usage costs at or near cost, reducing linear scaling of expenses](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Identified key areas for platform improvement: white labeling, cross-workspace asset sharing, parallelization, and permissioning](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Commitment to sign a short-term agreement (3 months) with plans to revisit for a longer-term commitment in February after progress on identified improvements](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)

## Topics

### Pricing Model and Cost Optimization

  - [Shifting from task-based pricing to a platform fee model with usage costs at or near cost](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [GXL to use their own API keys for LLMs to reduce costs](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [AirOps offering SEMrush API access at their cost, with potential for improved rates as they scale](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Exploring alternatives to expensive API calls (e.g., SEMrush content gap analysis) to optimize costs](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)

### Platform Enhancements

  - [White labeling: Custom branding, removing AirOps branding, pre-configured workspaces for customers](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Cross-workspace functionality: Sharing workflows, apps, and assets across workspaces](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Improved permissioning: Granular access control for team members and clients](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Parallelization: Addressing bottlenecks in workflow execution, particularly for iterative tasks](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)

### Scalability Concerns

  - [Current linear task execution causing slowdowns (e.g., 10-20 minute article generation times)](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Need for improved concurrency and parallelization within workflows](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=275.0)
  - [Desire for more efficient handling of batch jobs and high-volume content production](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

### Partnership Alignment

  - [AirOps emphasizing their shift towards helping GXL optimize and scale, rather than charging based on usage](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [GXL seeking transparency on cost structures to make informed build vs. buy decisions](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Both parties interested in finding mutually beneficial scaling models](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=651.0)

### Feature Requests and Roadmap

  - [Prioritized list of improvements:](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
    1.  Parallelization/speed improvements
    2.  Cross-workspace asset sharing
    3.  Permissioning enhancements
    4.  White labeling options
    5.  Usage/billing transparency
  - [Agreement to map these priorities to AirOps' planning and provide timelines](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)

## Next Steps

  - [AirOps to update the agreement with discussed changes, including usage costs at/near cost](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [Draft a 3-month commitment (December to February) with plans to revisit for a longer-term agreement](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=1977.0)
  - [AirOps to provide a roadmap with timelines for prioritized improvements](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=1950.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up discussion on content strategy tools and alternatives to expensive API calls](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=2218.0)
  - [Encourage more frequent communication from GXL team to AirOps for faster issue resolution and feature development](https://fathom.video/share/r3cgiW_84-f4i4xgxBaQEo2dRCL4y6h9?tab=summary&timestamp=2270.0)

action_items.description: Update agreement w/ new terms (usage at cost, 3-month commitment Dec-Feb). Send to Marcel
Map priorities discussed (white labeling, cross-workspace features, etc.) to planning. Provide rough timelines
Schedule follow-up call w/ Marcel re: SEMrush API costs & alternatives for content strategy
